name: Gamberetto Al Basilico
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add olive oil and minced garlic, stirring until fragrant.
3. Add sliced mushrooms to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
4. Stir in green onions, diced tomatoes, sliced almonds, and chopped basil.
5. Add artichoke quarters, shrimp, black pepper, oregano, crushed red pepper, lemon juice, and vermouth.
6. Gently simmer the mixture for an additional 2-3 minutes until the shrimp are cooked through.
7. Serve the sautéed shrimp and vegetables over pasta.
